children.label: B
children.text: numerical weather and ocean prediction; and

children.label: C
children.text: forecasting of hazardous weather and ocean conditions.
The Secretary may extend similar support to forces of the North Atlantic Treaty Organization, and to coalition forces, that are operating with the armed forces.

children.heading: .—Hydrographic Information
children.label: b .—Hydrographic Information
children.text: The Secretary of the Navy shall collect, process, and provide to the Director of the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency hydrographic information to support preparation of maps, charts, books, and geodetic products by that Agency.
